request.answer:
A full self-service refund is no longer possible after 45 days; the documented
30-day window only covers defective devices returned within that period.
After 30 days a support manager must explicitly approve the refund, and the
policy makes clear that approval is not guaranteed even for a defective unit.
The refund timing itself is not stated in the policy excerpts above, so we
cannot promise 48-hour processing — that detail is unsupported by the source
text.
context:
## Section 1 — Refund window

Opened devices may be returned within 30 days only if defective. Customers
must include the original packaging, accessories, and a description of the
defect. The 30-day window starts on the delivery date confirmed by the
courier.

## Section 2 — Manager approval

Refunds requested after the 30-day window require explicit approval from a
support manager. Approval is not guaranteed even when the device is defective;
the manager weighs purchase history, prior returns, and the description of the
issue.

## Section 3 — Shipping and tracking

Accessories ship separately from the main device. Tracking numbers can lag by
up to one business day, especially for international shipments. Lost packages
are investigated by the carrier, not by the support team.
request.question:
A customer received a defective phone 45 days ago. They want to know whether
they can still return it for a full refund without contacting support, and how
long the refund will take. What should we tell them, and what conditions
apply?

turns.text:
A customer received a defective phone 45 days ago. They want to know whether
they can still return it for a full refund without contacting support, and how
long the refund will take. What should we tell them, and what conditions
apply?

A full self-service refund is no longer possible after 45 days; the documented
30-day window only covers defective devices returned within that period.
After 30 days a support manager must explicitly approve the refund, and the
policy makes clear that approval is not guaranteed even for a defective unit.
The refund timing itself is not stated in the policy excerpts above, so we
cannot promise 48-hour processing — that detail is unsupported by the source
text.
